fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of source document on the demand line.

fields.name: Source ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number the source document on the demand line.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item on the demand line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the demand line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code on the demand line.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer, if any, on the demand line.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer, if any, on the demand line.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the customer.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies text that describes the entry.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Demand Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the demand date, which is the shipment date for sales orders and the due date for production components.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item is measured.

fields.name: Remaining Qty. to Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the demand line are not reserved from inventory.

fields.name: Qty. to Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the demand line you want to reserve.

fields.name: Available Qty. to Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the demand line can be reserved from inventory. This takes into account the Qty. to Reserve field on other demand lines with the same item number, location code, and variant code.

fields.name: Qty. in Stock
fields.tooltip: Specifies the current stock quantity for the item.

fields.name: Qty. Reserved in Stock
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that has been reserved from stock for this item.

fields.name: Qty. in Whse. Handling
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is currently in warehouse handling for this item.

fields.name: Accept
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to reserve this demand line.
